act: Canada Council for the Arts Act
subject: Re-appointment of a member of the Canada Council for the Arts
precis: Re-appointment of Irfhan Rawji of Calgary, Alberta, as a member of the Canada Council for the Arts, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years.
